div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(235, 219, 178) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
talas.json
─────────────────────────────
talas[]:
id string (adi, rupakam, misra_capu, …)
label string (Unicode display form)
searchTerms string (space-separated search aliases)

div.style: color: rgb(235, 219, 178) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
tanpura.json
─────────────────────────────
[]: (bare array, no wrapper key)
index int
id string (YouTube video ID)
url string
title string
uploader string
duration int (seconds)
upload_date string (YYYYMMDD)
note string (pitch: C, C#, D, D#, E, …)

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
recordings/{id}.json
─────────────────────────────
id string · permanent key
video_id string (YouTube 11-char ID)
url string
title string
date string (ISO 8601 or partial: 1965-01, 1967, 1960s)
venue string | null
occasion string | null
sources Source[]
sessions Session[]

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Session (nested in recording.sessions[])
─────────────────────────────
session_index int (1-based)
performers Performer[]
performances Performance[]

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Performer (shared shape: sessions + youtube)
─────────────────────────────
musician_id musician_id | null
role vocal | violin | veena | flute |
mridangam | ghatam | khanjira | …
unmatched_name string | null (when musician_id is null)

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Performance (nested in session.performances[])
─────────────────────────────
performance_index int (1-based)
timestamp string (HH:MM:SS)
offset_seconds int
display_title string
composition_id string | null → compositions/
raga_id string | null → ragas/
tala string | null → talas.json
composer_id string | null → musicians/
notes string | null
type tani | null (percussion solo)
version string | null

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
compositions/{id}.json
─────────────────────────────
id string · permanent key
title string
composer_id musician_id (ADR-110: all composers
are musician nodes)
raga_id raga_id
tala adi | rupakam | misra_capu |
khanda_capu | tisra_triputa | …
language Telugu | Sanskrit | Tamil |
Kannada | Malayalam | Other | null
sources Source[]
notes string | null

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ragas/{id}.json
─────────────────────────────
id string · permanent key
name string · canonical name
tradition carnatic | hindustani
aliases string[]
melakarta int | null (1–72; mela ragas only)
is_melakarta bool
cakra int | null (1–12; mela ragas only)
parent_raga raga_id | null (janya → parent mela)
katapayadi object | null
└ madhyama, ri, ga, da, ni (swara indices)
sources Source[]
notes string | null

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
musicians/{id}.json
─────────────────────────────
id string · permanent key
label string · display name
born / died int | null
era trinity | bridge | golden_age |
disseminator | living_pillars | contemporary
instrument vocal | violin | veena | flute |
mridangam | ghatam | khanjira | …
traditions string[] carnatic | hindustani
bani string | null (stylistic school)
sources Source[]
youtube YouTubeEntry[]

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
musicians/_edges.json (bare array)
─────────────────────────────
source musician_id ← guru
target musician_id ← shishya
confidence float 0–1
source_url string
note string | null

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
YouTubeEntry (embedded in musician.youtube[])
─────────────────────────────
url string
label string
composition_id string | null → compositions/
raga_id string | null → ragas/
year int | null
version string | null
performers Performer[] | null
kind recital | lecdem | omit
subjects Subjects | null (lecdem only)
└ raga_ids[] → ragas/
└ composition_ids[] → compositions/
└ musician_ids[] → musicians/

div.style: color: rgb(235, 219, 178) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Source (shared embedded shape)
─────────────────────────
url string
label string
type wikipedia | pdf | article | archive | other

div.style: color: rgb(29, 32, 33) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
graph.json
── DERIVED ARTIFACT ──
Compiled by bani-render from
all source files below.
nodes[] · edges[] · recordings[]
Never edit directly.
Regenerate after every data change.
